class.name: rbfsafe_moveit/CertifiedStartStateAdapter
class.description: Rejects planning requests whose start state is outside the configured SafeAtlas.

class.name: rbfsafe_moveit/CertifiedTrajectoryAdapter
class.description: Rejects and clears responses whose complete trajectory is not certified by the SafeAtlas.

class.name: rbfsafe_moveit/SafeIkKinematicsPlugin
class.description: Deterministic region-constrained IK that returns only Atlas-connected solutions.
